name: Hunyuan3D 2.1
description: Tencent Hunyuan3D 2.1 — full image-to-3D pipeline with production-ready PBR material generation. Higher quality than the Mini variant; requires significantly more VRAM (~10 GB shape, ~21 GB PBR texture).
author: Lightning Pixel

params_schema.label: Quality
params_schema.tooltip: Number of diffusion steps. More steps = better quality but slower.

params_schema.label: Mesh Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Octree resolution for mesh reconstruction. Higher = more detail but slower and more VRAM.

params_schema.label: Guidance Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength. Higher = closer to the input image.

params_schema.label: Generate PBR Texture
params_schema.tooltip: Generate physically-based (PBR) materials. Greatly increases quality but needs ~21 GB VRAM and the compiled texture extensions.

params_schema.label: Texture Views
params_schema.tooltip: Number of multi-view renders used for PBR texture synthesis. Only used when PBR texture is enabled.

params_schema.label: Texture Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Multi-view render resolution for PBR texture synthesis. Only used when PBR texture is enabled.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed for reproducibility. Set to -1 for a random seed.
